name: Fused Crucible

topRankStats: Crucible Blast Augment: Becomes a channeled ability consuming <LOWER_IS_BETTER>20 <ENERGY> Energy/s that ramps up. While active Chyrinka Pillars trigger chain reactions and their duration is frozen. Mobility is greatly reduced.
